issues.opened.description: Triggered when a new issue is created in a repository

issues.closed.description: Triggered when an issue is closed

issues.reopened.description: Triggered when a previously closed issue is reopened

issues.edited.description: Triggered when the title or body of an issue is edited

issues.assigned.description: Triggered when a user is assigned to an issue

issues.labeled.description: Triggered when a label is added to an issue

issue_comment.created.description: Triggered when a comment is created on an issue or pull request

issue_comment.edited.description: Triggered when a comment on an issue or pull request is edited

pull_request.opened.description: Triggered when a pull request is created

pull_request.closed.description: Triggered when a pull request is closed (check merged field to distinguish merge vs close)

pull_request.reopened.description: Triggered when a previously closed pull request is reopened

pull_request.ready_for_review.description: Triggered when a draft pull request is marked as ready for review

pull_request.review_requested.description: Triggered when a review is requested on a pull request

pull_request.synchronize.description: Triggered when new commits are pushed to a pull request branch

pull_request.labeled.description: Triggered when a label is added to a pull request

pull_request.edited.description: Triggered when the title or body of a pull request is edited

pull_request_review.submitted.description: Triggered when a pull request review is submitted (approved, changes requested, or commented)

pull_request_review.dismissed.description: Triggered when a pull request review is dismissed

pull_request_review_comment.created.description: Triggered when a review comment is created on a pull request diff

workflow_run.completed.description: Triggered when a GitHub Actions workflow run completes (check conclusion for success/failure)

workflow_run.requested.description: Triggered when a GitHub Actions workflow run is requested

workflow_job.completed.description: Triggered when a GitHub Actions workflow job completes

workflow_job.queued.description: Triggered when a GitHub Actions workflow job is queued

check_run.completed.description: Triggered when a check run completes (CI status check)

deployment_status.created.description: Triggered when a deployment status is created (success, failure, pending, etc.)

push.description: Triggered when commits are pushed to a repository branch or tag

create.description: Triggered when a branch or tag is created

delete.description: Triggered when a branch or tag is deleted

release.published.description: Triggered when a release is published and available to users

release.created.description: Triggered when a new release is created (may be draft)

repository.created.description: Triggered when a new repository is created in the organization

discussion.created.description: Triggered when a new discussion is created in a repository

discussion.answered.description: Triggered when a discussion is marked as answered

discussion_comment.created.description: Triggered when a comment is created on a discussion

organization.member_added.description: Triggered when a user is added to an organization

organization.member_removed.description: Triggered when a user is removed from an organization

team.added_to_repository.description: Triggered when a team is granted access to a repository

team.removed_from_repository.description: Triggered when a team's access to a repository is revoked

branch_protection_rule.created.description: Triggered when a branch protection rule is created

branch_protection_rule.edited.description: Triggered when a branch protection rule is edited

action.description: The action that was performed: opened, edited, deleted, pinned, unpinned, closed, reopened, assigned, unassigned, labeled, unlabeled, locked, unlocked, transferred, milestoned, or demilestoned

issue.description: The issue object including id, number, title, body, state, user, labels, assignees, milestone, created_at, updated_at, closed_at, html_url

changes.description: The changes to the issue if the action was 'edited'. Includes previous title and/or body values

assignee.description: The user that was assigned or unassigned from the issue (present for assigned/unassigned actions)

label.description: The label that was added or removed (present for labeled/unlabeled actions)

milestone.description: The milestone associated with the event (present for milestoned/demilestoned actions)

repository.description: The repository where the issue belongs

organization.description: The organization that owns the repository, if applicable

sender.description: The user that triggered the event

installation.description: The GitHub App installation, if the event was triggered via an app

action.description: The action that was performed: created, edited, or deleted

issue.description: The issue or pull request the comment belongs to. Includes id, number, title, state, user, labels, html_url. Contains a pull_request key if the comment is on a PR

comment.description: The comment object including id, body, user, created_at, updated_at, html_url, author_association

changes.description: The changes to the comment body if the action was 'edited'

repository.description: The repository where the comment was made

organization.description: The organization that owns the repository, if applicable

sender.description: The user that triggered the event

installation.description: The GitHub App installation, if the event was triggered via an app

action.description: The action performed: opened, edited, closed, reopened, assigned, unassigned, review_requested, review_request_removed, labeled, unlabeled, synchronize, converted_to_draft, ready_for_review, locked, unlocked, auto_merge_enabled, auto_merge_disabled, enqueued, dequeued, milestoned, or demilestoned

pull_request.description: The pull request object including id, number, title, body, state, draft, merged, user, head, base, labels, assignees, requested_reviewers, milestone, created_at, updated_at, merged_at, html_url, diff_url, additions, deletions, changed_files

changes.description: Changes to the PR if action was 'edited'. Contains previous title and/or body

requested_reviewer.description: The user whose review was requested or removed (present for review_requested/review_request_removed)

requested_team.description: The team whose review was requested (present for review_requested when a team is requested)

assignee.description: The user assigned or unassigned (present for assigned/unassigned actions)

label.description: The label added or removed (present for labeled/unlabeled actions)

before.description: The previous head SHA before the synchronize event (present for synchronize action)

after.description: The new head SHA after the synchronize event (present for synchronize action)

reason.description: The reason for the event (present for auto_merge_disabled, auto_merge_enabled, and dequeued actions)

repository.description: The repository where the pull request belongs

organization.description: The organization that owns the repository, if applicable

sender.description: The user that triggered the event

installation.description: The GitHub App installation, if the event was triggered via an app

action.description: The action performed: submitted, edited, or dismissed

review.description: The review object including id, user, body, commit_id, submitted_at, state (approved, changes_requested, commented, dismissed), html_url, author_association

pull_request.description: The pull request that was reviewed

changes.description: Changes to the review body if action was 'edited'

repository.description: The repository where the pull request belongs

organization.description: The organization that owns the repository, if applicable

sender.description: The user that triggered the event

installation.description: The GitHub App installation, if the event was triggered via an app

action.description: The action performed: created, edited, or deleted

comment.description: The review comment object including id, diff_hunk, path, position, original_position, commit_id, body, user, created_at, updated_at, html_url, in_reply_to_id

pull_request.description: The pull request the comment belongs to

changes.description: Changes to the comment body if action was 'edited'

repository.description: The repository where the pull request belongs

organization.description: The organization that owns the repository, if applicable

sender.description: The user that triggered the event

installation.description: The GitHub App installation, if the event was triggered via an app

action.description: The action performed: completed, requested, or in_progress

workflow_run.description: The workflow run object including id, name, node_id, head_branch, head_sha, path, run_number, event, status, conclusion (success, failure, cancelled, timed_out, action_required, stale, neutral, skipped), workflow_id, html_url, created_at, updated_at, run_attempt, run_started_at, actor, triggering_actor, head_commit, head_repository

workflow.description: The workflow definition including id, node_id, name, path, state, created_at, updated_at

repository.description: The repository where the workflow run belongs

organization.description: The organization that owns the repository, if applicable

sender.description: The user that triggered the event

installation.description: The GitHub App installation, if the event was triggered via an app

action.description: The action performed: completed, in_progress, queued, or waiting

workflow_job.description: The workflow job object including id, run_id, run_url, run_attempt, node_id, head_sha, name, status, conclusion, started_at, completed_at, steps, labels, runner_id, runner_name, runner_group_id, runner_group_name, workflow_name, head_branch

repository.description: The repository where the workflow job belongs

organization.description: The organization that owns the repository, if applicable

sender.description: The user that triggered the event

installation.description: The GitHub App installation, if the event was triggered via an app

deployment.description: The deployment requested, if applicable (present when the workflow job is associated with a deployment)

action.description: The action performed: created, completed, rerequested, or requested_action

check_run.description: The check run object including id, head_sha, node_id, external_id, name, status (queued, in_progress, completed), conclusion (success, failure, neutral, cancelled, timed_out, action_required, stale, skipped), started_at, completed_at, output, check_suite, app, pull_requests

requested_action.description: The action requested by the user (present for requested_action events). Contains identifier

repository.description: The repository where the check run belongs

organization.description: The organization that owns the repository, if applicable

sender.description: The user that triggered the event

installation.description: The GitHub App installation, if the event was triggered via an app

deployment_status.description: The deployment status object including id, state (error, failure, inactive, in_progress, queued, pending, success), description, environment, target_url, created_at, updated_at, log_url, environment_url

deployment.description: The deployment object including id, sha, ref, task, environment, description, creator, created_at, updated_at, payload

check_run.description: The check run associated with the deployment status, if applicable

workflow_run.description: The workflow run associated with this deployment status, if any

workflow.description: The workflow associated with this deployment status, if any

repository.description: The repository where the deployment belongs

organization.description: The organization that owns the repository, if applicable

sender.description: The user that triggered the event

installation.description: The GitHub App installation, if the event was triggered via an app

ref.description: The full git ref that was pushed to, e.g. refs/heads/main or refs/tags/v1.0

before.description: The SHA of the most recent commit on ref before the push

after.description: The SHA of the most recent commit on ref after the push

created.description: Whether the push created the ref (new branch/tag)

deleted.description: Whether the push deleted the ref

forced.description: Whether the push was a force push

compare.description: URL comparing the before and after commits

commits.description: Array of commit objects pushed. Each commit has id, tree_id, distinct, message, timestamp, url, author, committer, added, removed, modified

head_commit.description: The most recent commit on ref after the push (same structure as commits array items)

pusher.description: The user who pushed. Contains name and email

repository.description: The repository where the push occurred

organization.description: The organization that owns the repository, if applicable

sender.description: The user that triggered the event

installation.description: The GitHub App installation, if the event was triggered via an app

ref.description: The git ref that was created (branch name or tag name)

ref_type.description: The type of ref: branch or tag

master_branch.description: The name of the repository's default branch

pusher_type.description: The type of pusher: user or deploy_key

repository.description: The repository where the ref was created

organization.description: The organization that owns the repository, if applicable

sender.description: The user that triggered the event

installation.description: The GitHub App installation, if the event was triggered via an app

ref.description: The git ref that was deleted (branch name or tag name)

ref_type.description: The type of ref: branch or tag

pusher_type.description: The type of pusher: user or deploy_key

repository.description: The repository where the ref was deleted

organization.description: The organization that owns the repository, if applicable

sender.description: The user that triggered the event

installation.description: The GitHub App installation, if the event was triggered via an app

action.description: The action performed: published, unpublished, created, edited, deleted, prereleased, or released

release.description: The release object including id, tag_name, target_commitish, name, body, draft, prerelease, created_at, published_at, author, html_url, assets, tarball_url, zipball_url

changes.description: Changes to the release if action was 'edited'. Contains previous name and/or body

repository.description: The repository where the release belongs

organization.description: The organization that owns the repository, if applicable

sender.description: The user that triggered the event

installation.description: The GitHub App installation, if the event was triggered via an app

action.description: The action performed: created, deleted, archived, unarchived, edited, renamed, transferred, publicized, or privatized

repository.description: The repository object including id, name, full_name, owner, private, html_url, description, fork, created_at, updated_at, pushed_at, default_branch, visibility

changes.description: Changes if action was 'edited' or 'renamed'. For renamed, contains previous repository name

organization.description: The organization that owns the repository, if applicable

sender.description: The user that triggered the event

installation.description: The GitHub App installation, if the event was triggered via an app

action.description: The action performed: created, edited, deleted, pinned, unpinned, locked, unlocked, transferred, category_changed, answered, unanswered, labeled, or unlabeled

discussion.description: The discussion object including id, number, title, body, state, category, answer_html_url, answer_chosen_at, answer_chosen_by, user, html_url, created_at, updated_at, locked, comments

answer.description: The answer comment (present for answered events)

old_answer.description: The previous answer (present for unanswered events)

label.description: The label added or removed (present for labeled/unlabeled actions)

repository.description: The repository where the discussion belongs

organization.description: The organization that owns the repository, if applicable

sender.description: The user that triggered the event

installation.description: The GitHub App installation, if the event was triggered via an app

action.description: The action performed: created, edited, or deleted

comment.description: The comment object including id, body, user, created_at, updated_at, html_url, author_association

discussion.description: The discussion the comment belongs to

changes.description: Changes to the comment body if action was 'edited'

repository.description: The repository where the discussion belongs

organization.description: The organization that owns the repository, if applicable

sender.description: The user that triggered the event

installation.description: The GitHub App installation, if the event was triggered via an app

action.description: The action performed: renamed, member_added, member_removed, or member_invited

membership.description: The membership object between the user and the organization (present for member_added/member_removed). Contains state, role, user, organization

invitation.description: The invitation object (present for member_invited). Contains id, login, email, role

organization.description: The organization where the event occurred

sender.description: The user that triggered the event

installation.description: The GitHub App installation, if the event was triggered via an app

action.description: The action performed: created, deleted, edited, added_to_repository, or removed_from_repository

team.description: The team object including id, node_id, name, slug, description, privacy, notification_setting, permission, members_url, repositories_url, html_url

changes.description: Changes to the team if action was 'edited'. Contains previous description, name, privacy, notification_setting, or repository permissions

repository.description: The repository that was added or removed (present for added_to_repository/removed_from_repository)

organization.description: The organization that owns the team

sender.description: The user that triggered the event

installation.description: The GitHub App installation, if the event was triggered via an app

action.description: The action performed: created, edited, or deleted

rule.description: The branch protection rule including id, name, admin_enforced, allow_deletions_enabled, allow_force_pushes_enabled, created_at, updated_at, required_approving_review_count, required_status_checks, dismiss_stale_reviews_on_push, require_code_owner_reviews, require_last_push_approval

changes.description: Changes to the rule if action was 'edited'

repository.description: The repository where the rule applies

organization.description: The organization that owns the repository, if applicable

sender.description: The user that triggered the event

installation.description: The GitHub App installation, if the event was triggered via an app
